Title: How do I connect to the VPN?
Answer:
To connect to the company VPN:

  1. Install the GlobalProtect client from the IT Software Center
  2. Launch GlobalProtect and enter the portal address: vpn.company.com
  3. Sign in with your corporate credentials
  4. Click Connect

If you experience issues, contact the IT Help Desk at ext. 5555.

Title: What are the office hours?
Answer:
Our standard office hours are Monday through Friday, 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM local time.

Flexible work arrangements may be available with manager approval. Please refer to the Flexible Work Policy for details.

Title: How do I request time off?
Answer:
To request time off:

  1. Log in to the HR Portal at hr.company.com
  2. Navigate to Time & Attendance > Request Time Off
  3. Select the type of leave and dates
  4. Submit for manager approval

Requests should be submitted at least 2 weeks in advance for planned absences.

Title: Where can I find the company org chart?
Answer:
The company org chart is available in the following locations:

  • SharePoint: HR Hub > Organization
  • Outlook: Search any employee name and view the 'Organization' tab
  • Teams: Use the 'Organization' tab on any user's profile card

Title: How do I submit an IT support ticket?
Answer:
You can submit IT support tickets through any of these channels:

  • Self-Service Portal: itsupport.company.com
  • Email: itsupport@company.com
  • Teams: Message the IT Help Bot
  • Phone: Extension 5555

For urgent issues, please call the help desk directly.
